unchanged_findings.evidence_hint: Detected environment variable usage on line 6: 'OPENAI_API_KEY=your-openai-api-key-here'
unchanged_findings.governance_relevance: High risk of credential leakage for proprietary AI provider.
unchanged_findings.recommended_review: Never hardcode API keys. Verify that this key is supplied securely at runtime via secrets manager.

unchanged_findings.governance_relevance: Direct usage of proprietary LLM provider via official SDK.
unchanged_findings.recommended_review: Verify usage complies with company data privacy policy. Ensure no proprietary data is sent to external LLMs without explicit authorization.

unchanged_findings.governance_relevance: LangChain usage indicates complex LLM workflows and chaining.
unchanged_findings.recommended_review: LangChain pipelines dynamically construct chains. Trace all active prompts and integrations to ensure there are no un-monitored model connections.
Review prompt content for bias, safety, and proprietary data.

unchanged_findings.governance_relevance: LlamaIndex usage indicates RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) patterns.
unchanged_findings.recommended_review: LlamaIndex connects files to LLMs. Audit all document parsing pipelines and local index stores to prevent leaking restricted intellectual property.
